text: {\pos(655,410)}Translation\NYibis
{\pos(655,500)}Soundtracking\NHalee
{\pos(1050,142)}Editing\NSewil
{\pos(1050,253)}Infoboxes\NSewil
{\pos(1050,383)}Timing\NDatenshi
{\pos(1050,493)}Edit-checking\NGalaxy 9000
Until I can reach the sky,
I believe, until the next tomorrow, hey
Chasing and being chased on top of Mobius' ring.
Getting closer and facing forward, hey I want to share your style.
It begins, it expands, this flavor that exceeds imagination
I feel so good throughout my body, I will become free, oh yeah
Share the music, even if it's far.
Share the one dream, by telling each other.
Share the good times and laugh.
I'll keep going until I can reach the sky.
Let's overcome it now, I believe in the next tomorrow yeah yeah...
You were waiting there on the other side of the invisible wall.
I'll be there soon, I believe in one world yeah yeah...
{\fad(1900,450)}Iron Mask Duval

name: Chopper
text: The Flying Fish just... left?

name: Franky
text: Even though they were focused on the attack back there...

name: Robin
text: It seems like they received some kind of message.

name: Robin
text: Maybe they were ordered to retreat? Although I wouldn't know why...

name: Luffy
text: I wanna ride those! Those Flying Fish can stay in the air for five minutes, huh?

name: Luffy
text: Awesome!

name: Sanji
text: Anyway, we're now headed for their base, right?

name: Luffy
text: Awesome!

name: Sanji
text: In that case, we'd better be prepared to fight them again.

name: Sanji
text: But who'd have guessed that they'd come at us from the sky?

name: Usopp
text: How about getting the cannons out on the deck?\NI'll shoot them all down!

name: Franky
text: Nice thinking!

name: Camie
text: I wonder if Hacchin is alright...

name: Pappag
text: You know, Macro is really after you!

name: Pappag
text: You've gotta be careful too!
{\fad(600,0)}East of the\NSabaody Archipelago\NThe Flying Fish Riders'\NHeadquarters

name: Raider 1
text: Duval-sama! The three of them have returned!

name: Raider 2
text: Duval-sama, why'd you order us to pull back?

name: Raider 3
text: I'd like to know that too.

name: Raider 3
text: You could have just left the capture of the mermaid and the pirates to us!

name: Duval
text: You idiots!

name: Duval
text: You guys...
{\fad(1600,500)}{\fs34}Kidnapping Gang\N"Flying Fish Riders"\NHead\N{\r}"Iron Mask Duval"

name: Duval
text: {\an8}Do you have any idea how long I've been anticipating...

name: Duval
text: The arrival of...

name: Duval
text: Those pirates?!

name: Duval
text: Whenever I think of dat man... {Note that Duval's strange accent is intentional. Do not change it.}

name: Duval
text: This huge, great scar on my back starts throbbin' like hell!

name: Man
text: O-Oh, crap! The Head's mad!

name: Duval
text: Ev'ry single day... I've cursed dat man's name ev'ry single day!

name: Man
text: Head, please calm down!

name: Duval
text: I'm gonna kill dat guy right here, today!

name: Duval
text: Got it?!

name: Duval
text: Dat's my life-long, immortal wish!

name: Duval
text: Do ya understand?!

name: Raider
text: Y-Yes! That guy can't be allowed to live!

name: Duval
text: And dat's why ya gotta make sure to do this properly! Dat's how we'll get'im!

name: Duval
text: You punks just follow my orders exac'ly!

name: Man
text: Yes, Head!

name: Duval
text: Hey, Macro-crew!

name: Tansui
text: Huh? You called?

name: Gyaro
text: What is it, Duva?

name: Macro
text: "Duva"?" Whaddaya mean, Gyaro?! And what's with the "Huh", Tansui?!

name: Macro
text: Ya guys should learn some better manners!
{\fad(750,680)\fs30}Macro Pirates\N{\r}Gyaro\N{\fs30}(Pop-Eyed Goldfish Fishman)
{\fad(750,680)\fs30\}Macro Pirates Boss\N{\r}Macro\N{\fs30}(Makuropharynx\NFishman)
{\fad(750,680)\fs30}Macro Pirates\N{\r}Tansui\N{\fs30}(Arowana Fishman)

name: Tansui
text: {\an8}Heh, "Duva", that's funny!

name: Macro
text: {\an8}Geez! Oh, you called, Master Duval?!

name: Gyaro
text: Boss... This guy's totally freaked out...

name: Macro
text: Oh, shut up!

name: Macro
text: Ahhh, I apologize profusely, Master...

name: Macro
text: These guys are complete idiots, they don't even know what they're sayin'!

name: Duval
text: Oh, it's fine, you guys.

name: Duval
text: To me, you're like my angels of good fortune.

name: Duval
text: I can't even say how thankful I am to you.

name: Tansui
text: Go on.

name: Macro
text: I told you to shut up, Tansui!

name: Duval
text: Thanks to you guys... at last...

name: Duval
text: I can meet them...

name: Duval
text: The Straw Hat... Pirates!

name: Macro
text: Straw Hats? Who're they?

name: Hachi
text: The Straw Hats? So it wasn't just my imagination?

name: Duval
text: Listen up...

name: Duval
text: Dat guy...

name: Duval
text: Dat guy I bin waitin' all my life ter kill is on dat boat, a'ight?!

name: Duval
text: I ain't never gonna forgive dat punk!!!

name: Man
text: Head! Calm down, please!

name: Macro
text: He really does hate that guy, huh?

name: Hachi
text: I never thought I'd hear the name "The Straw Hat Pirates" here...

name: Hachi
text: Hey, you, the big guy!

name: Macro
text: It's Duval-sama! Show some manners, you damn octopus!

name: Hachi
text: {\an8}Are you saying that Camie has been captured by the Straw Hat Pirates?!
{\fad(700,0)}Takoyaki Shop Owner\NHacchan\N{\fs30}(Octopus Fishman)\NFormer Officer of the Arlong Pirates

name: Hachi
text: This is bad... Of all the people to run into...

name: Hachi
text: Are they coming here as well?

name: Raider
text: Yeah, they're heading here right now.

name: Raider
text: But ain't it your mermaid friend who's turned to the pirates for help?

name: Raider 2
text: I don't know the details, but it doesn't seem like she's been caught.

name: Raider 2
text: Well, no matter who she brings with her,

name: Raider 2
text: as long as we're here, we'll just catch'em all and sell them to the Human Shop!

name: Hachi
text: As if they could do that!\NThose guys are terrifyingly strong!

name: Hachi
text: This is a problem... I wonder if Nami's there too...

name: Hachi
text: I wonder if she's still mad at me...

name: Hachi
text: Well, of course she would be...

name: Hachi
text: I did those horrible things to her when I was with Arlong, and all...

name: Hachi
text: If I don't hurry up and escape before those guys get here, they'll definitely beat me up, too...

name: Hachi
text: I'm in trouble!

name: Raider
text: Duval-sama! The Straw Hats are here!

name: Duval
text: They're finally here?

name: Hachi
text: Say, Macro...

name: Macro
text: Huh? What is it?

name: Hachi
text: I'll give you lots of takoyaki, so could you please let me go?

name: Macro
text: Yeah, right! Dumbass! What kinda glutton do you take me for?!

name: Duval
text: Is that man on the ship?

name: Raider
text: Yes! He's definitely there!

name: Macro
text: It's about time for you to pay the piper, an' all! Prepare yourself!

name: Franky
text: Looks like that's the Flying Fish Riders' base.

name: Luffy
text: And this Hacchin-guy is being kept over there?

name: Sanji
text: I'll go in there and save him in a flash, Camie-chwan~!

name: Camie
text: Thanks a lot, Sanji-chin!

name: Camie
text: Oh! But everyone! Please be careful!

name: Camie
text: The Macro Crew alone have captured me about 30 times!

name: Usopp
text: You get captured too much!

name: Usopp
text: You get eaten too much too.

name: Franky
text: This isn't really an island, though. It seems like someone built a village on top of the water.

name: Zoro
text: But why would they want to set up their base here?

name: Sanji
text: Who knows...

name: Chopper
text: Anyway, it sure is quiet here.

name: Usopp
text: Luffy! Should we really...

name: Luffy
text: Forward!

name: Usopp
text: Shouldn't we at least think of a plan?!

name: Camie
text: Hey! Hacchin! Are you alright?!

name: Pappag
text: Get out here, Macro! Give Hachi back!

name: Hachi
text: Oh, crap! It really is the Straw Hats' ship!

name: Hachi
text: Damn it!

name: Hachi
text: I really can't get out... Well, in that case...!

name: Hachi
text: {\fad(150,150)}Octo-Hachi Black!

name: Robin
text: It seems like someone is inside that cage.

name: Camie
text: Could that be Hacchin...?

name: Pappag
text: This is great, Camie! There aren't even any enemies around!

name: Pappag
text: They must all be off having a snack!

name: Usopp
text: Are you guys serious?!

name: Usopp
text: Anyone could tell that this is a trap!

name: Franky
text: Everyone is obviously hiding in there, waiting to ambush us.

name: Camie
text: What insight!

name: Pappag
text: I-I never would have considered that!

name: Franky
text: That's why you keep getting caught!

name: Hachi
text: I'm here! Camie, I'm okay, so you don't have to worry!

name: Camie
text: You're all black! What happened?!

name: Hachi
text: Well, this is kinda my own fault...

name: Hachi
text: Anyway, this is a trap, so hurry up and turn back!

name: Hachi
text: You know that I'm strong, right? So it's fine, just go!

name: Zoro
text: That voice is really familiar, and then there's that unusual silhouette...

name: Zoro
text: Hey, Nami, what do you think?

name: Nami
text: There's something very suspicious about him...

name: Luffy
text: What?

name: Sanji
text: We'll know if we ask him, right?

name: Sanji
text: Hey! Is Arlong doing alright?!

name: Hachi
text: Huh? Arlong?

name: Hachi
text: No, him, Choo, Kuroobi and everyone else got caught by the Navy.

name: Hachi
text: I was the only one who escaped, and I'm now living out my old dream of running a takoyaki-stand.

name: Luffy
text: Arlong...?

name: Luffy
text: So it was you, huh? You damn squid!

name: Hachi
text: Damn it!

name: Luffy
text: So you're that damn squid who was with Arlong?! You're that takoyaki-seller, Hacchin?!

name: Robin
text: What?

name: Usopp
text: Well, it was a while ago now...

name: Usopp
text: Nami's hometown was once under the control of a nasty crew of fishmen called the Arlong Pirates...

name: Usopp
text: Nami was in quite a terrible situation herself...

name: Usopp
text: And that octopus was one of the top-members.

name: Franky
text: So he's an old enemy, huh?

name: Usopp
text: Of course, I took Luffy and the others along, and kicked the crap out of the whole crew!

name: Chopper
text: Usopp, you're awesome!

name: Usopp
text: Y... yeah, I guess...

name: Usopp
text: I thought all the fishmen were arrested by the Navy... But it seems like that guy managed to get away...

name: Brook
text: I see. You have gone through a lot...

name: Luffy
text: Hey, squid! Now that we know it's you, there's no way we'll save you!

name: Luffy
text: B-But...

name: Luffy
text: I-Is your takoyaki really as good as I heard it was?!

name: Sanji
text: Oh, come on! Getting caught between your appetite and your reason?

name: Zoro
text: How stupid.

name: Camie
text: You mean, you know Hacchin?

name: Camie
text: Is Hacchin an old friend of yours?

name: Zoro
text: He's not our friend!

name: Usopp
text: Turn the ship around!

name: Camie
text: Nami-chin...

name: Nami
text: Sorry, Camie...

name: Nami
text: We never would have thought your friend was that guy...

name: Camie
text: No way...

name: Camie
text: You won't help me save him after all?

name: Camie
text: Hacchin!

name: Hachi
text: Camie! That's okay! Just turn back! This is a trap!

name: Camie
text: No... I'll save you...

name: Camie
text: Hacchin, you're always saving us after all!

name: Camie
text: Pappag!

name: Pappag
text: That's right! I never thought you guys would be such a load of unfeeling halfwits!

name: Pappag
text: Idiots! Idiots!

name: Zoro
text: Shut up!

name: Pappag
text: Wait for us, Hachi!

name: Camie
text: We definitely won't abandon you, Hacchin!

name: Pappag and Camie
text: Here we go!

name: Sanji
text: Camie-chan!

name: Fishmen
text: We've got you now, Camie!

name: Usopp
text: Oh, come on, that's just pathetic!

name: Macro
text: Now we're gonna be rich!

name: Gyaro
text: With Hachi, who always saves you, in that state and all!

name: Tansui
text: You won't get away, Camie!

name: Hachi
text: That's why I told you to run! Camie! Pappag!

name: Sanji
text: Why, you... Camie hasn't done anything!

name: Nami
text: Wait, Sanji-kun!

name: Nami
text: Fine, let's save Hachi as well.

name: Nami
text: Hachi isn't that bad! Actually, he's harmless.

name: Nami
text: And we did make a promise to Camie.

name: Sanji
text: N-Nami-swan... That firm, determined appearance is just wonderful!

name: Usopp
text: Hey, Nami...

name: Zoro
text: Is that really fine?

name: Nami
text: Yes.

name: Nami
text: Luffy!

name: Luffy
text: If you say so, then I guess there's no choice.

name: Luffy
text: Let's save the octopus as well.

name: Usopp
text: Your eyes turned into takoyaki!

name: Duval
text: Are the preparations ready...

name: Duval
text: Flying Fish Riders?

name: Riders
text: Of course, we're always prepared!

name: Luffy
text: {\fad(150,150)}Pistol!

name: Luffy
text: Wait a minute!

name: Macro
text: He's a Devil Fruit User?!

name: Hachi
text: Straw Hat?

name: Macro
text: Damn him!

name: Camie
text: Luffy-chin!

name: Pappag
text: You...

name: Luffy
text: Alright! I got them back!

name: Hachi
text: Straw Hat! Thank you so much! I'm indebted to you!

name: Luffy
text: Zoro! Cut the octopus' ropes and the cage!

name: Zoro
text: Sure!

name: Hachi
text: Straw Hat! Be careful!

name: Hachi
text: You've already sprung the trap!

name: Hachi
text: The Flying Fish Riders have you surrounded!

name: Duval
text: Charge!

name: Riders
text: Yes sir!

name: Camie
text: Luffy-chin...

name: Luffy
text: Whether it's from the sea, or the sky, we're ready for'em!

name: Luffy
text: We're gonna beat'em all!

name: Luffy
text: You guys!

name: Luffy
text: Prepare for battle!

name: Crew
text: Yeah!

name: Macro
text: Damn it... Now, while we have the chance, let's take Camie back!

name: Hachi
text: Camie! Pappag! It's dangerous, so stand back!

name: Camie
text: Get them! Go, Luffy-chin!

name: Luffy
text: Now, come, Flying Fish!

name: Camie and Pappag
text: Get them, get them, go, go!

name: Usopp
text: Here they come!

name: Chopper; Sanji & Zoro
text: Alright!

name: Luffy
text: Well, well...  Who's got the freshest fish here?

name: Luffy
text: Alright! Him!

name: Luffy
text: I got him!

name: Riders
text: What?

name: Luffy
text: My turn!

name: Rider
text: Uh, wait...

name: Luffy
text: This is awesome!

name: Luffy
text: Whoo! I'm flying!

name: Chopper
text: Luffy's riding one of those things?!

name: Sanji
text: Ignore him.

name: Rider
text: Take this!

name: Usopp
text: Bombs!

name: Riders
text: Damn!

name: Usopp
text: Too dangerous! That was close!

name: Sanji
text: Geez... If they had hit a lady with that, I wouldn't have let them live.

name: Nami
text: Pull in the sail! It'll get in the way!

name: Rider
text: Everybody, dive!

name: Riders
text: Understood!

name: Chopper
text: Luffy!

name: Brook
text: Luffy-san!

name: Franky
text: We're in the middle of a fight, so what the heck do you think you're doing?!

name: Luffy
text: I'b sowwy...

name: Franky
text: Oh, and why'd you two try to save him? You're Devil Fruit users too, right?!

name: Chopper
text: I'b sowwy...

name: Brook
text: I seem to have troubled you, too...

name: Nami
text: It's even worse when we have to save all three of you hammers!

name: Nami
text: Idiot, don't waste my time!

name: Camie and Pappag
text: The Macro crew!

name: Macro
text: Now, let's get Camie back while we have the chance!

name: Crew
text: Yeah!

name: Pappag
text: Hey, Straw! Could you give us a hand here?

name: Hachi
text: You freed me from the ropes and the cage! Thanks, Roronoa! You're a nice guy, huh?

name: Zoro
text: It was the captain's orders, idiot.

name: Fishmen
text: Hachi!

name: Camie and Pappag
text: Hacchin!

name: Hachi
text: You guys! You took advantage of the fact that I couldn't move and beat me as much as you wanted!

name: Tansui
text: I haven't punched you yet, Hachi! I'll finish you off with my Fishman Karate!

name: Macro
text: Man, you've got terrible luck!

name: Macro
text: Stop flappin' your mouth like that, damn it!

name: Macro
text: We've got much worse in store for you!

name: Gyaro
text: Now, come! I've developed a new style of Goldfish Fencing just for you!

name: Gyaro
text: The waters will be stained with blood!

name: Camie
text: Hacchin!

name: Hachi
text: {\fad(150,150)}Takoyaki Punch!

name: Fishmen
text: We'll let you go for now!

name: Camie
text: Hacchin!

name: Hachi
text: Camie! Pappag!

name: Camie
text: I'm so glad, Hacchin!

name: Hachi
text: I'm so sorry, Camie, Pappag! I was going to save you!

name: Pappag
text: Don't worry about it, Hachi!

name: Pappag
text: Ah! Watch out!

name: Rider
text: Don't forget that this is our territory! After all, the ones who caught you in the first place...

name: Rider
text: Were us, the Flying Fish Riders!

name: Hachi
text: Roronoa!

name: Camie
text: Zoro-chin!

name: Zoro
text: You need to watch yourselves...

name: Zoro
text: Get back. You can just leave this to us.

name: Hachi
text: Thanks for everything, Roronoa!

name: Hachi
text: I'm really sorry for what happened back then!

name: Hachi
text: I hurt you pretty badly with my Six-Sword Style...

name: Zoro
text: You didn't even land a single blow, as far as I remember!

name: Hachi
text: Oh, that's right.

name: Usopp
text: We did it, Chopper! Now, take this!

name: Chopper
text: Fire!

name: Usopp
text: Bullseye! Did you see that, you damn fish?!

name: Chopper
text: Usopp, you're amazing!

name: Duval
text: Anyone up for the Zero Fight?

name: Riders
text: The Zero Fight?

name: Rider
text: Interesting! But isn't that move life-threatening for us too?

name: Rider
text: I'm sure that you will be more than up to paying the medical fees?

name: Duval
text: I'll give you a million!

name: Rider
text: I'll do it, Head! I'll go! Move, move, move!

name: Chopper
text: A really huge guy is coming! And he's swinging a massive club...

name: Sanji
text: He isn't steering at all... Don't tell me that he is just going for a collision...

name: Sanji
text: If that giant hits us at that speed, the ship won't hold...

name: Sanji
text: Luffy! You take care of the fish.

name: Luffy
text: Sure.

name: Rider
text: Interesting... With this size and speed, the impact will be like a small meteor!

name: Chopper
text: He's not changing his course at all, just like Sanji said!

name: Sanji
text: However, he's not the only one... who can deal some damage while in the air!

name: Luffy
text: {\fad(150,150)}Rubber Balloon!

name: Luffy
text: This'll be our dinner tonight!

name: Chopper
text: That's so cool, you two!

name: Robin
text: Looking at it up close, it really is big.

name: Riders
text: Damn... This crew doesn't seem like it'll go down easily.

name: Usopp
text: Now that I look at it, there are a lot of them flying around up there...

name: Usopp
text: How many will we have to beat before it ends?

name: Luffy
text: I wanna ride one, dammit! Don't think I've given up just because of what happened earlier!

name: Nami
text: Give it up! I won't save you again!

name: Brook
text: How can this be?

name: Luffy
text: What's up, Brook?

name: Brook
text: To think that my first real action as a member of the Straw Hat Crew was to drown...

name: Brook
text: It would be a disgrace if I did not help you!

name: Brook
text: It is about time we reduced the number of those Flying Fish...

name: Brook
text: Please observe!

name: Chopper
text: What an incredible jump!

name: Rider
text: What's with that skeleton mask guy?

name: Rider
text: We'll skewer you!

name: Brook
text: {\fad(150,150)}Lullaby Song

name: Chopper
text: Wow! They all fell asleep...

name: Nami
text: You too?!

name: Brook
text: Music is... Power!

name: Brook
text: Excuse me!

name: Riders
text: We fell asleep!

name: Rider
text: Damn him, what was that?!

name: Rider
text: He used some sort of dirty trick!

name: Brook
text: It is no trick!

name: Brook
text: It is music!

name: Riders
text: Wait!

name: Luffy
text: He's pretty good, that Brook!

name: Luffy
text: Looks fun... Here I come!

name: Nami
text: Wait, Luffy! Not again!

name: Luffy
text: Alright, I caught you! I won't forgive you if you dive again!

name: Luffy
text: Hey, you're asleep?!

name: Luffy
text: Hey, hey! Wake up!

name: Rider
text: That guy! He went into the Head's room!

name: Duval
text: You saw it...?

name: Luffy
text: You...!

name: Duval
text: It seems like you know me...
